research_topic: Transition metal-doped sillenites for photocatalytic degradation of organic contaminants in water.
objectives:
1. Identify transition metal-doped sillenites used in photocatalysis.
2. Compare combustion synthesis methods.
3. Analyze photocatalytic performance for organic contaminant degradation.
* Identify research trends and knowledge gaps.
notes: Literature published between 2016 and 2026 from Scopus and Web of Science, focusing on transition metal-doped sillenites synthesized by combustion for photocatalytic water treatment.
